Raptors Down 0-2 to Cavaliers in First Round | NO (Raptors series win) | HIGH confidence**

The Toronto Raptors are facing elimination after losing Games 1 and 2 to the Cleveland Cavaliers[1][4]. The Cavaliers won Game 1 by 126-113[1] and Game 2 by 115-105[4]. With the Raptors down 0-2, they are "huge underdogs" in the series[1], and the search results indicate they "desperately need a turnaround"
